title: Cross region latency symptom (Networking)
summary: Resolve "cross region latency" — symptom for the Networking surface.

content.text:
## Symptom

An operation against the Networking surface fails with an error matching "cross region latency (symptom)".

## Resolution

1. Inspect the error envelope.
2. Re-issue with corrected parameters.
3. Confirm via the audit log.

See the [Networking API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get) for the exact field set.
